title: acaena × metaphyllidion
intro: Acaena × metaphyllidion, also known as the silver grass or silver furze, is a hybrid plant species within the Acaena genus, native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its flavonoids, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acaena × metaphyllidion include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used topically to treat skin conditions, and it can be found in various forms, including creams, ointments, and tinctures.
